name: away_natvent_not_activated
description: Away mode, warm day, outdoor 68F (cooler than indoor 74F â€” nat-vent conditions would be favorable if home). Sensor opens at 14:00. In production, nat-vent activation requires home/guest occupancy. Away mode should produce paused, NOT natural_ventilation. The simulator _apply_nat_vent_or_pause() does not check occupancy â€” this is simulator_support:false pending occupancy guard port.
notes: Production behavior: automation.py _activate_natural_ventilation() checks occupancy â€” if away/vacation, skip.
Simulator current behavior: _apply_nat_vent_or_pause() has no occupancy check; nat-vent activates
whenever outdoor < indoor and conditions are met, regardless of occupancy.
So the simulator incorrectly produces 'natural_ventilation' here.
simulator_support:false on the paused assertion; logic-track verification needs occupancy guard port.
Covers Priority 6b away_natvent from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Morning classification â€” cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
User leaves â€” away setback applied (setback_cool=79F)
Afternoon: indoor 74F, outdoor 68F â€” nat-vent eligible by temperature alone (outdoor < indoor, indoor > comfort_heat)
Window opens while away â€” production: paused (away suppresses nat-vent); simulator: natural_ventilation (bug)

assertions.reason: sensor_open while away â€” away mode suppresses nat-vent activation; normal HVAC pause fires instead
assertions.gap: Simulator _apply_nat_vent_or_pause() has no occupancy check. Production nat-vent activation guards on occupancy. Fixing requires adding occupancy check to _apply_nat_vent_or_pause() in simulate.py.

verdict.summary: Away mode suppresses nat-vent activation â€” sensor_open produces pause, not nat-vent (production only)
verdict.observed_behavior: production: paused on sensor_open while away; simulator incorrectly produces natural_ventilation
verdict.expected_behavior: Nat-vent only activates when occupancy is home or guest; away/vacation occupancy forces pause
